title: rubus lejeunei var. ericetorum
intro: Rubus lejeunei var. ericetorum, also known as the black raspberry or bramble, is a type of thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family. The plant contains anthocyanins, powerful antioxidants that have been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus lejeunei var. ericetorum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves, stems, and roots in water or a solvent, and are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
